underlying_goal: Implement a feature flag migration from LaunchDarkly to ProductGrant system for the interpret feature, then ship the changes via PR with CI passing
friction_detail: Sidebar spec initially failed because a ProductGrant stub intercepted the enable_product_grant helper, and feedbacks_spec needed an additional grant for other_user in a different org.
brief_summary: User asked to implement a plan migrating the interpret feature flag from LaunchDarkly to ProductGrant and ship it as a PR; Claude completed all tasks, fixed test issues, and landed a green PR.
